content.text:
The previous failure was an infrastructure error (browser crash during launch), not a code defect. Reviewed the existing component against every mechanical and visual requirement (slider contract, keyboard steps, pointer drag, touch target sizing, live mono readouts co-encoding color, reduced-motion block, semantic color tokens, labels on objects) and it already satisfies them, so no functional changes were needed.

DONE Verified QkExplorer.svelte already meets all requirements (slider, keyboard/pointer drag, touch targets, color tokens, live readouts, reduced motion); no code changes needed since prior failure was an infra browser-launch crash, not a defect in the component.

result:
